title: Shroff Eye Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shroff Eye Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
